tasks.label: AeroBIM: backend quality gate
tasks.command: python -m ruff format --check src tests; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; python -m ruff check src tests; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; python -m mypy src; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; python -m pytest tests -q

tasks.label: AeroBIM: pilot weekly checks
tasks.command: python -m pytest tests -q; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; python -m aerobim.tools.evaluate_extraction --min-macro-f1 0.70; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; python -m aerobim.tools.summarize_conflict_breakdown --pack samples/benchmarks/project-package-pilot-moscow-v1.json

inputs.description: Conventional commit message (single author, no co-author trailers)
